languages.text: "Я начинаю подозревать заговор. И если это так, вас ждет кара".
"I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."
languages.original_text: "Я начинаю подозревать заговор. И если это так, вас ждет кара".

traits.locale_text: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."
"I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."
"I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."
"I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."

languages.text: «Empiezo a sospechar que se trata de alguna conspiración. Si tengo razón, las represalias serán terribles».
languages.original_text: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."

traits.locale_text: «Empiezo a sospechar que se trata de alguna conspiración. Si tengo razón, las represalias serán terribles».

languages.text: “我开始怀疑这背后有阴谋了。若真如此，你就等着受罚吧。”
languages.original_text: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."

traits.locale_text: “我开始怀疑这背后有阴谋了。若真如此，你就等着受罚吧。”

languages.text: « Je commence à soupçonner une conspiration. Si mes doutes s'avèrent fondés, vous serez dûment châtié. »
languages.original_text: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."

traits.locale_text: « Je commence à soupçonner une conspiration. Si mes doutes s'avèrent fondés, vous serez dûment châtié. »

languages.text: "Bir komplodan şüphelenmeye başlıyorum. Eğer bu doğru çıkarsa seni büyük bir ceza bekliyor."
languages.original_text: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."

traits.locale_text: "Bir komplodan şüphelenmeye başlıyorum. Eğer bu doğru çıkarsa seni büyük bir ceza bekliyor."

languages.text: 「陰謀を疑い始めてきた。それが本当なら、お前は報復を受けるだろう」
languages.original_text: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."

traits.locale_text: 「陰謀を疑い始めてきた。それが本当なら、お前は報復を受けるだろう」

languages.text: "Ich gehe langsam von einer Verschwörung aus. Sollte sich das als wahr erweisen, tragt Ihr die Konsequenzen."
languages.original_text: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gehe langsam von einer Verschwörung aus. Sollte sich das als wahr erweisen, tragt Ihr die Konsequenzen."
